test_split_role: Held-out diagnostic evaluation split used for the private-benchmark main and ablation results.
split_policy: The revised held-out test split is stratified across cases, reasoning types, difficulty levels, risk dimensions, and uncertainty labels, while preserving all original gold answers, support paths, rationales, and uncertainty labels.
notes: Only split assignments are changed by the revised split.
Non-test instances are used for benchmark construction, protocol verification, and adapter-format checking, not for selecting test-specific thresholds.
All query identifiers in this manifest correspond to entries in data/techrisk_eventlogic_bench/queries.jsonl and queries.csv.
